notes: Menu page states 'our menu changes daily.' Food and Beverage menus are dated PDFs (Walrus-Food-Menu-6.18.pdf) hosted on DigitalOcean Spaces. PDF fetch timed out at 180s — no dish data extracted. TWO compounding error cases: (a) PDF extraction needed (download + parse, or render), and (b) daily-rotating menu means any snapshot is stale within 24h. Share-plate oyster bar: store as a high-volatility row, capture a representative menu + capture date, and lean on category-level composition ('a meal to share') rather than specific dish IDs. Corkage $40/750mL.
